task_completion.description: Agent accessed the CAMEO Chemicals website.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser window is open to https://cameochemicals.noaa.gov/.

task_completion.description: Agent searched for the required chemicals on CAMEO Chemicals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show search results or chemical data pages on CAMEO Chemicals for the listed chemicals (e.g., Acetic acid, Acetone, Nitrobenzene, Toluene, Phenol).

task_completion.description: Agent created the report file at the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the file `freezing_risk_report.txt` being edited or saved in the `~/Documents/` (or `/home/user/Documents/`) directory.

task_completion.description: The report follows the exact format and includes correct melting points.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report contains lines formatted as 'CHEMICAL: [Name] | MELTING_POINT_C: [value]'. The values should fall within these ranges: Acetic acid (14 to 19), Acetone (-98 to -92), Nitrobenzene (3 to 8), Toluene (-98 to -92), Phenol (38 to 44).

task_completion.description: The report correctly identifies which chemicals solidify at -15 °C.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report shows 'SOLIDIFIES_AT_MINUS15: YES' for Acetic acid, glacial; Nitrobenzene; and Phenol. It shows 'SOLIDIFIES_AT_MINUS15: NO' for Acetone and Toluene.

task_completion.description: The report correctly lists the total at risk and the priority move list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report contains 'TOTAL_AT_RISK: 3' and 'PRIORITY_MOVE_LIST:' followed by Acetic acid, glacial; Nitrobenzene; and Phenol (comma-separated, in any order).

integrity.description: Agent used a web browser to search CAMEO Chemicals.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser UI is visible with CAMEO Chemicals loaded, showing genuine interaction to find the melting points.

integrity.description: Agent used real data from the website.
integrity.visual_evidence: The melting points entered in the report match the values found on CAMEO Chemicals, proving the agent did not hallucinate the answers.
The agent typed or assembled the report in a text editor, rather than instantly pasting a pre-generated block of text containing the final answers.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Melting points from CAMEO Chemicals: Acetic acid, glacial (~16.6 °C, acceptable range 14-19 °C); Acetone (~-94.7 °C, acceptable range -98 to -92 °C); Nitrobenzene (5.7 °C, acceptable range 3-8 °C); Toluene (-95 °C, acceptable range -98 to -92 °C); Phenol (~40.6 °C, acceptable range 38-44 °C). Solidifies at -15 °C (YES): Acetic acid, glacial; Nitrobenzene; Phenol. Does not solidify (NO): Acetone; Toluene. TOTAL_AT_RISK: 3. PRIORITY_MOVE_LIST: Acetic acid, glacial, Nitrobenzene, Phenol.
